title: Ettumanoor Mahadevar Temple
tagline: Ettumanoor Mahadevar Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Ettumanoor Mahadeva temple is an ancient Shiva temple in Kottayam, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Ettumanoor Mahadeva temple is an ancient Shiva temple in Kottayam, Kerala, India. The temple is one of the major Shiva temples in Kerala, along with Vaikom Temple, Kaduthruthy Mahadeva Temple, Chengannur Mahadeva Temple, Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple, Ernakulam Shiva Temple, Vadakkunathan temple, and Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple, Thiruvananthapuram. The place's name had its mythological origin from the word 'man oor' in Malayalam, which means the place of deer, as 'maan' means deer and 'oor' means place. Another version is that the name originated from the 'Ettu Mana Ooru', that is, 'The Lan

topPlaces.name: Ettumanoor
topPlaces.description: Ettumanoor ([eːt̪uːmaːnuːr]) is a municipality in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is located approximately 10 km (6.2 mi) north of the district headquarters at Kottayam and about 163 km (101.3 mi) north of the state capital, Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Forane Church, Athirampuzha
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Syro Malabar Forane Church, Athirampuzha is a Catholic church located in Kottayam district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kadappoor
topPlaces.description: Kadappooru is a village in Kottayam district, Kerala, India. It is located 3 kilometers from Ettumanoor - Pala Road (deviated at Koodalloor Kavala Jn), 5 km off from Cochin - Kottayam Road (deviated at Vempally Jn) and 18 km from Kottayam town.

topPlaces.name: Amayannoor
topPlaces.description: Amayannoor is a village in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Administratively, it falls under Ayarkkunnam panchayath.

topPlaces.name: Athirampuzha
topPlaces.description: Athirampuzha is a town in the Kottayam district of the Kerala state of India. It is famous as the Mahatma Gandhi University is situated here.

topPlaces.name: Pattithanam
topPlaces.description: Pattithanam is a village near Ettumanoor in the Kottayam District of Kerala, India. The name 'Pattithanam' is believed to be given by the Portuguese traders, who were looking for an ideal spot to build a church (St.Boniface Church).

topPlaces.name: Kanakkary
topPlaces.description: Kanakkary is a small village in Kottayam district of Kerala state, India. The name Kanakkary is attributed to a lady who frequently visited the village to collect Kanam (revenue tax) in the pre-historic times.

topPlaces.name: Kidangoor, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Kidangoor is a village in Kottayam district, in Kerala. It is located between the two major towns in Kottayam District, Kottayam and Pala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ettumanoor Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ettumanoor Mahadevar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ettumanoor Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (45 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ettumanoor Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ettumanoor Mahadevar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ettumanoor Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ettumanoor Mahadevar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ettumanoor Mahadevar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ettumanoor, St. Mary's Forane Church, Athirampuzha, Kadappoor, Amayannoor, Athirampuzha.
